title: Work Experience
schema_help: Each role is an object with 'id', 'title', 'employer', 'start', 'end' (or 'present'), optional 'location', optional 'url', and 'highlights' (array of bullet strings). Include 'tech' (array) if you want to capture stack used for the role.

items.title: Software Engineering Intern
highlights: Implemented feature X that reduced latency by 30%
Wrote integration tests and improved CI reliability
